student.routes
==============

.. py:module:: student.routes

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Student-facing routes: course browser, transcript, add course, and drop course.

   All routes require an authenticated session with role 'student' or
   'system_admin'. Routes are registered on the 'student' blueprint under /student.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   student.routes.index
   student.routes.transcript
   student.routes.drop_course
   student.routes.add_course


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: index()

.. py:function:: transcript()

.. py:function:: drop_course(o_id)

.. py:function:: add_course(o_id)
